message: Stage -1 drafted angle=0 v1 mode=cold-start status=completed
Sharp finite-grid monotone-concave CMSM bounds equal coordinate projections of the pointwise interval polytope.

Review boundary stage_0.5_to_0 routed to user: Case 6 (genuine difficulty) + regression pattern (a): all three reviews converge on the same structural verdict — the locked PartialID problem cannot reach the novelty_target=field floor because the only field-tier kernel (law-level joint sharpness) is refuted by the density-version obstruction, leaving only generic Manski-style outer containment. Producer correctly diagnosed and even reframed around the obstruction; the cap-exhausting flag is structural to the locked law-level formulation, not an upstream defect Stage 0/1/4d can fix.
